data.content: Implemented 6 new hierarchy state guard tests: 4 app-level (recursive cascade with great-grandchildren, deferred descendant terminal cascade, update_knot terminal cascade approval path, selective blocker reporting) and 2 CLI-level (deferred child provenance in error output, update command cascade flag). All tests pass, make sanity green at 95.36% coverage. Branch: worktree-knots-142d-hierarchy-tests.
